_comment: Local mirror of Neotoma `env_var_mapping` entities — the manifest the
publish flow iterates over. Maps each env var to its CANONICAL 1Password
reference. NOT secret (references only, no values). Keep in sync with the
env_var_mapping registry in Neotoma; values are read from 1Password at
publish time and written (encrypted) to secrets/<name>.sops.env.
Structure: one block per output file. `default` always applies; an
environment overlay (selected via $ENVIRONMENT) overrides matching keys.

default.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: op://Private/Anthropic – Claude/api key – shared (openclaw, neotoma, ateles)
